A l’heure de la guerre des drones, cette culture et cette expertise communes suscitent l’intérêt de leurs alliés européens.

title: Inside Ukraine’s Game-Changing Drone Industry
summary: In recent months, Ukrainian drones have successfully struck dozens of sites deep inside Russia, targeting the oil industry, weapons plants, and logistics hubs. But while Ukraine has developed a world-leading military technology to defend itself from a much larger aggressor, drones will not be enough to end the war.

title: Le mont Blanc est-il vraiment le sommet le plus haut d’Europe ?

title: European leaders mourn US Senator Lindsey Graham
summary: European leaders are mourning the death of Republican U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, who died suddenly on Saturday at the age of 71. Graham, who strongly advocated for sanctions against Russia over its war against Ukraine, had just returned from a state visit to Kyiv. title: Sommet de l'Otan Ankara 2026, l'amour et la colère de Donald Trump

title: Should the Bank of Japan Raise Interest Rates?
summary: At the beginning of 2013, when "Abenomics" was rolled out in Japan, the yen was significantly overvalued, and looser monetary policy was badly needed. Today, the opposite is true, indicating that interest-rate hikes may well be the right prescription for Japan.

title: Comment aider les agriculteurs chinois face au changement climatique ?

title: Ukraine hits Russian tankers in Sea of Azov
summary: Moscow said a Ukrainian drone hit a Russian tanker as it was entering the canal between the Sea of Azov and the Black Sea on Sunday, as Kyiv intensifies its attacks on Russian fuel supplies. The governor of Russia’s Rostov region, Yury Slyusar, said on Telegram that a drone strike caused a fire on the vessel but that it had since been contained.
